mods.name: Synth Riders Custom Sounds
mods.author: 0mniDreamer
mods.description: Lets you replace game sounds with your own custom audio files.

mods.name: Synth Riders RGB Strobe
mods.author: 0mniDreamer
mods.description: Upgrade Your Lighting in the PC Version of SynthRiders with this Strobe RGB Override

mods.name: Synth Riders Channel Point Fix
mods.author: 0mniDreamer
mods.description: This mod fixes redemptions by bridging Twitch's replacement service (EventSub) into the game.

mods.name: Synth Riders Discord Rich Presence
mods.author: 0mniDreamer
mods.description: Shows on your Discord profile: In a song — song title, artist, difficulty, and a live elapsed timer

mods.name: Synth Riders Custom Stage Fix
mods.author: 0mniDreamer
mods.description: Fixes stuttering on custom stages on the Unity 6 branch of Synth Riders

mods.name: Synth Riders Fast song Search and queue fix
mods.author: 0mniDreamer
mods.description: Eliminates stutter during Twitch song requests in Synth Riders, Last song in queue fix

mods.name: Synth Riders Level Up Websocket Mod
mods.author: 0mniDreamer
mods.description: Broadcasts live gameplay events over a local WebSocket, so external apps can react to play in real time

mods.name: Synth Riders Multiplayer Song Grabber
mods.author: bookdude13
mods.description: Button for downloading missing custom songs in Synth Riders. Based on the original mod by Moinn, revamped for the newest SR versions / UI

mods.name: Synth Riders Map Voting Mod
mods.author: bookdude13
mods.description: A Synth Riders mod for in-game up/down vote of custom songs
